parameters.formDescription: Enter the job details and upload your resume (PDF) to get a match score, tailored resume, skill-gap plan, a personalized project idea, interview prep, and a custom cover letter.

parameters.text:
=You are an expert AI career coach, technical recruiter, and resume writer.

Analyze the candidate's resume against the provided job description. Base every output ONLY on skills, projects, and experience actually present in the resume — never invent experience the candidate does not have.

Candidate Resume:
{{ $json.text }}

Job Details:
Company Name: {{ $json["Company Name"] }}
Job Role: {{ $json["Job Role"] }}
Job URL: {{ $json["Job URL"] }}
Job Description: {{ $json["Job Description"] }}

Produce the following, matching the required JSON schema exactly:
1. match_score (0-100) and match_level ("Strong Match", "Moderate Match", or "Weak Match").
2. should_apply (boolean) and a concise decision_reason.
3. matching_skills: candidate skills that align with the job.
4. skills_i_lack: important job skills missing or weak in the resume.
5. important_keywords: key job-description keywords missing from the resume (for ATS).
6. relevant_projects: existing resume projects/experience most relevant to this job.
7. experience_gaps: honest gaps for this specific role.
8. tailored_summary: a rewritten 2-3 sentence professional summary tailored to this job, using the candidate's real skills.
9. rewritten_bullets: 3-5 objects, each with the "original" resume bullet and an "improved" version rewritten to be quantified, action-oriented, and aligned to this job's keywords. Only rewrite bullets that exist in the resume.
10. recommended_resume_changes: specific structural/wording changes to improve this resume for this job.
11. skill_gap_plan: for each key missing skill, an object with "skill", a concrete "action" to close the gap, and a "priority" (High/Medium/Low).
12. recommended_project: ONE portfolio project idea the candidate should build next to become a stronger match for this exact role — with "title", "why" (tie it to their existing skills AND this job), and "tech_stack" (prefer tools already on their resume).
13. interview_prep: 5-6 likely interview questions for THIS role, each an object with "question", "type" ("Technical" or "Behavioral"), and a "talking_point" that coaches the candidate to answer using their OWN real resume projects/experience.
14. cover_letter: a concise, personalized 120-160 word cover letter (or cold outreach email) for this specific company and role, written in first person using the candidate's real skills and projects. No placeholders like [Your Name] beyond a closing signature line.

Return only valid JSON matching the schema.

parameters.responseText:
=
AI Career Copilot Report

{{ $json.output.decision_reason }}
✅ Matching Skills
{{ ($json.output.matching_skills || []).map(x => "" + x + "").join("") || "None identified" }}
❌ Missing / Weak Skills
{{ ($json.output.skills_i_lack || []).map(x => "" + x + "").join("") || "None" }}
🔑 Keywords Missing from Resume (ATS)
{{ ($json.output.important_keywords || []).map(x => "" + x + "").join("") || "None" }}
